title: Starfighter Superiority Evaluation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Starfighter Superiority Evaluation''' was a performance test that was undertaken by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]-candidates who hoped to join the fleet's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]].

{{Edu-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-05-03 -->[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
